title: Thai Crispy Crumble Bites
description: Crispy on the outside, crumbly on the inside, these Thai-inspired bites are a snack to remember. Perfect for a quick meal or appetizer.
instructions: In a large bowl, mix together the bread cubes, crispy crumbs, and crumble.
In a separate bowl, whisk together the olive oil, soy sauce, honey, chili flakes, garlic powder, and salt.
Pour the wet ingredients over the dry ingredients and mix until the bread is evenly coated.
Transfer the mixture to a baking dish and bake for 15-20 minutes, or until crispy and golden brown.
Remove from the oven and sprinkle with chopped cilantro.
